description: Style Note Being fashionable means being able to combine the right amount of comfort with a bucket load of style in your outfit. Wranger goes colourful and super trendy with this comfortable top. Pair it with your favourite pair of jeans or a comfortable pair of shorts. Product Details A printed red top with tiny white and green print all over, a mandarin collar split with a wide V neckline and a half buttoned placket, ruffles around the cuffs and neckline, short raglan sleeves and an elastic band at the hem Material and Care 100% viscose Hand wash cold using a mild detergent with like colours Do not bleach Do not iron on print or embellishments Do not wring Do not tumble dry and flat dry in shade Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
